case_title: MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. VS. XIANG WEI LEE ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, XIANG WEI $2,317.85 PRINCIPAL, $261.80 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,579.65, SEE SCANNED DOC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-22-2025 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 210074160) TO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-26-2024 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-26-2024 CONTINUED TO APR-22-2025 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
